title: GitHub issue templates + CONTRIBUTING
goal: Add GitHub community files: issue forms (bug report + feature request) under .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE with a config.yml, a pull-request template, and a root CONTRIBUTING.md that links the existing dev-setup and mini workflow docs — guiding contributors through reporting and submitting changes.

steps.title: Issue forms for bug and feature
steps.detail: .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml and feature_request.yml as GitHub issue forms (valid YAML, required fields, labels).

steps.title: Issue template chooser config
steps.detail: .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml — disable blank issues and add contact links (docs / website / discussions).

steps.title: Pull request template
steps.detail: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md with a contributor checklist (typecheck, tests, CHANGELOG, scope).

steps.title: CONTRIBUTING.md at repo root
steps.detail: Dev setup (clone, npm install, build, test, typecheck), the mini phase workflow, commit/PR conventions, links to README sections and LICENSE.

steps.title: Wrap up and checks
steps.detail: Tick mini todo done 14, assert every new YAML parses, npm run typecheck and npm test stay green.
